architecture_decision.odoo_role: Optional adapter for commodity ERP capabilities after sandbox comparison and licence/cost review
architecture_decision.xero_role: Accounting ledger and approved export boundary; never the canonical order, fitment or logistics source
architecture_decision.rollback: Disable adapters and retain the deterministic local domain core and event ledger

latest_physical_rule.truth_boundary: Reference allocator enforces 40 side lockers. Centre-trolley capacity remains fail-closed until engineering evidence is approved.

workflows.external_gate: supplier splitting and live order service not connected
routing, driver app, scales and proof-of-delivery services not connected
customer/workshop CRM and billing not connected
pricing policy approval, Xero and direct debit not connected
supplier and consumer-law resolution workflow not connected

controls: Versioned event envelopes with correlation and causation identifiers
Source pointer and payload hash evidence
No default 20%, 25% or Cost+A$1 trade policy
Centre-trolley overflow disabled unless explicitly configured
No external provider or production action
truth_boundary: Repository-local contracts and deterministic SQLite evidence only. No supplier, Xero, payment, route, scanner, staging or production integration is proven.
